What We Do

Our Services

From roof to drain — we handle every aspect of metal fabrication and plumbing with precision and quality materials.

Metal Roofing

Custom metal roofing solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial buildings. Durable, weather-resistant, and built to withstand Chennai's climate for decades.

  • Sheet Metal Roofing
  • Corrugated Sheets
  • Industrial Shed Roofing
  • Waterproofing

Plumbing Works

Professional plumbing installations and repairs for homes, apartments, and commercial spaces. CPVC, UPVC, and GI pipe works with premium fittings.

  • Pipe Fitting & Installation
  • Water Supply Lines
  • Drainage Systems
  • Bathroom Fittings

Welding & Fabrication

Precision MIG, TIG, and arc welding for structural steel, gates, grills, railings, and custom metal fabrication work for any requirement.

  • MIG & TIG Welding
  • Gate & Grill Fabrication
  • Structural Steel Work
  • Custom Metal Work
Our Projects

Our Work Speaks for Itself

Every project is a testament to our commitment to quality, precision, and durability.

"Quality is never an accident — it is always the result of intelligent effort."

— MG Fabrication Works

Why Choose Us

Chennai's Most Trusted Fabricators

We combine old-school craftsmanship with modern techniques to deliver fabrication work that stands the test of time. Every weld, every joint, every pipe — done right.

10+
Years Experience
A decade of trusted craftsmanship across Chennai and surrounding areas.
500+
Projects Completed
From single homes to large industrial complexes — we've done it all.
On-Time
Delivery Promise
We respect your schedule and commit to deadlines without compromising quality.
Premium
Quality Materials
We use only certified, high-grade steel, pipes, and fittings for lasting durability.
